=== INCIDENT ===

00:00

attempted login

Alert: Azure AD Password Spray
Source IP: 166.18.170.235
MITRE: T1110.003

=== RETRIEVED CONTEXT ===

MITRE:
T1110.003
Password Spray

Definition:
One common password tried against many accounts.

Indicators:
Many users; few attempts each; same source IP and password pattern.

Recommendation:
Block source; reset sprayed accounts; enforce conditional access.

=== END ===
